recommendations.title: Summer with Monika
recommendations.overview: One summer day, two teens begin a reckless affair and abandon their families to be with one another.

recommendations.title: Sawdust and Tinsel
recommendations.overview: A number of complicated relationships develop between a circus ringmaster, his estranged wife and his lover.

recommendations.title: The Passion of Anna
recommendations.overview: A recently divorced man and an emotionally devastated widow begin a love affair.

recommendations.title: Saraband
recommendations.overview: Reuniting the characters of Johan and Marianne three decades after "Scenes from a Marriage," "Saraband" follows Marianne’s visit to her reclusive ex-husband, where she finds him locked in a destructive conflict with his troubled son Henrik and Henrik

recommendations.title: Wild Strawberries
recommendations.overview: Crotchety retired doctor Isak Borg travels from Stockholm to Lund, Sweden, with his pregnant and unhappy daughter-in-law, Marianne, in order to receive an honorary degree from his alma mater. Along the way, they encounter a series of hitchhikers, eac

recommendations.title: Summer Interlude
recommendations.overview: During a brief summer vacation, a lonely woman recalls her first love thirteen years earlier.

recommendations.title: Winter Light
recommendations.overview: A Swedish pastor fails a loving woman, a suicidal fisherman and God.

recommendations.title: Cries and Whispers
recommendations.overview: As Agnes slowly dies of cancer, her sisters are so immersed in their own psychic pains that they are unable to offer her the support she needs.

recommendations.title: Persona
recommendations.overview: A young nurse, Alma, is put in charge of Elisabeth Vogler: an actress who is seemingly healthy in all respects, but will not talk. As they spend time together, Alma speaks to Elisabeth constantly, never receiving any answer.

recommendations.title: Crisis
recommendations.overview: A small-town piano teacher is shocked by the arrival of her foster daughter's biological mother, whose young lover soon follows and causes further disruption.
